events.text: Own Goal by Sead Kolasinac, Bosnia and Herzegovina.  Argentina 1, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0.
Marcos Rojo (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Emir Spahic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Argentina 2, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Gonzalo Higuaín.

Goal!  Argentina 2, Bosnia and Herzegovina 1. Vedad Ibisevic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Senad Lulic with a through ball.
